'''Gizka steak''' was a blood delicacy made from [[Gizka/Legends|gizka]]. [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] ate it.

Fried gizka [[Steak/Legends|steak]] was one of [[Droo Rawk|Droo's]] special dishes.

==Appearances==
